french-bo.text: Bo French is a candidate for Railroad Commissioner of Texas, running with Republican Party of Texas.
Bo French's recorded background: Bo French, former chair of the Tarrant County Republican Party.
As of 2026-05-16, Bo French's campaign had raised $1,473,367 in campaign receipts and spent $1,023,661, per Texas Ethics Commission filings (this filing period only, not a cycle-to-date total).

rosenthal-jon.text: Jon Rosenthal is a candidate for Railroad Commissioner of Texas, running with Texas Democratic Party.
Jon Rosenthal's recorded background: Jon Rosenthal, state representative from the 135th district (2019–present).
As of 2025-12-31, Jon Rosenthal's campaign had raised $59,723 in campaign receipts and spent $58,710, per Texas Ethics Commission filings (this filing period only, not a cycle-to-date total).

dibianca-arthur.text: Arthur DiBianca is a candidate for Railroad Commissioner of Texas, running with Libertarian.
Arthur DiBianca's recorded background: Arthur DiBianca (Libertarian)
As of 2025-12-31, Arthur DiBianca's campaign had raised $3,750 in campaign receipts and spent $0, per Texas Ethics Commission filings (this filing period only, not a cycle-to-date total).

base.summary: Railroad Commissioner of Texas race: Bo French, Jon Rosenthal, Arthur DiBianca. This overview lists each candidate's party, background, and campaign finance where available in our data set.
base.caveats: Our data set for this race covers candidate name, party, incumbency, background summary, and campaign finance totals where a filing was found (federal candidates file with the FEC; Texas state offices file with the Texas Ethics Commission -- each finance bullet names which). We do not have recorded voting histories or issue-by-issue policy positions for these candidates in this data set.
